caption: A man wearing a red traditional cap and glasses speaks into a microphone in a news broadcast setting. He is shown in a large main window, while a smaller inset window on the right displays a still image of him alongside the text "ON THE PHONE," "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," "POLITICAL ANALYST," and "LAGOS." The broadcast includes a purple banner with "PLUS POLITICS" and a white ticker stating "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." A red and white banner at the bottom contains the word "SUBSCRIBE" and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE." The "plustv" logo appears in the top left corner of the screen. Across the sequence, the man continues to speak, with slight movements in his expression and posture, while the on-screen graphics, text, and layout remain constant. Additional text "FOLLOW US" and "Startimes CH 308" appear at the very bottom of the final frames.
